zh.Whitechurch, Herefordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾其其
zh.Castle Bytham, Stanford, Lincolnshire, E: 英國林可爾史爾卡素 白坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Devereux於1315年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾其其時，他的父親Walter Devereux54歲，母親Margaret De Braose53歲。他於1330年與Anne Barre在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1377年1月27日在英國賀福爾賀福德享年62歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾賀福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Devereux于1315年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾其其时，他的父亲Walter Devereux54岁，母亲Margaret De Braose53岁。他于1330年与Anne Barre在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1377年1月27日在英国賀福爾賀福德享年62岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾賀福德。

nameMeanings.name: Devereux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Devereux was born in 1315, in Whitchurch, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Devereux, was 54 and his mother, Margaret De Braose, was 53. He married Anne Barre in 1330, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 27 January 1377, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Devereux est né en 1315, à Whitchurch, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Devereux, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Braose, avait 53 ans. Il a épousé Anne Barre en 1330, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 27 janvier 1377, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Devereux 1315 in Whitchurch, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Devereux 54 und seine Mutter Margaret De Braose 53. Er hat 1330 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Anne Barre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Januar 1377 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Hereford, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Devereux è nato il nel 1315 nel Whitchurch, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter Devereux, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Margaret De Braose, aveva 53 anni. Lui sposato Anne Barre nel 1330, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 gennaio 1377, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Devereuxが1315年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィトチャーチで生まれた時，父Walter Devereuxは54歳，母Margaret De Braoseは53歳であった。1330年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでAnne Barreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1377年1月27日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで62歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Devereux(이)가 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 휘트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Devereux(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret De Braose(은)는 53세였다. 그는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Anne Barre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1377년 1월 27일 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Devereux nasceu em 1315, em Whitchurch, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Devereux, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Braose, tinha 53 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Barre em 1330, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1377, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Devereux родился в 1315 г. в местности уичурч, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Devereux было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Braose, 53. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Barre в 1330 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 27 января 1377 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Devereux nació en 1315, en Whitchurch, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter Devereux, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Margaret De Braose, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Anne Barre en 1330, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de enero de 1377, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
